weapons.name: KAM - Crank

base_stats.damage_bonus: Suppression: Dealing more DMG against Deviants

mechanics.description: Burn mechanics with increased damage and bonuses upon killing burned enemies.

effects.description: Deals Status DMG of 10% Psi Intensity every 0.5s for 6s. DMG increases with more stacks, up to 5 stacks.
Grants Reload Speed +20% for 5 seconds.
Grants Burn DMG +15% for 5 seconds.

weapons.description: KAM Assault Rifle packs a punch with its hefty recoil but delivers reliable sustained fire, making it ideal for mid-range combat

weapons.name: M416 - Autumn Equinox

mechanics.description: Fortress Warfare mechanics that trigger after hitting enemies 7 times, granting Heavy Armor to allies and HP recovery in the area, along with damage bonuses when HP is high.

effects.description: Creates an area of effect within a 2m radius that grants allies Heavy Armor for 5 seconds and recovers 4% of max HP per second.
When HP is above 75%, Weapon DMG +25%.

weapons.description: M416 Assault Rifle with pinpoint accuracy, rock-steady, your go-to for mid to long-range combat

weapons.name: SOCR - Outsider

mechanics.description: Power Surge mechanics with increased trigger chances on hit, enhanced chance upon critical hits, and additional bonuses when attacking specific targets.

effects.description: Deals Status DMG of 50% Psi Intensity once and inflicts Power Surge status for 6 seconds, reducing accuracy by 40%.
Critical hits increase the chance to trigger Power Surge by 30% for 3 seconds.

properties.description: Increases the base chance to trigger Power Surge by 30%.

effects.description: Penetration: Increases damage by 20% when attacking Rosetta.

weapons.description: SOCR Assault Rifle with high accuracy, perfect for mid to long-range combat

weapons.name: KAM - Abyss Glance

base_stats.damage_bonus: Suppression: Dealing more DMG against Deviants

mechanics.description: Frost Vortex mechanics with increased damage based on proximity to the vortex center and additional bonuses when triggering on multiple hits.

effects.description: Traps enemies within a 4.5m radius and inflicts 30% Psi Intensity Status DMG per second for 4 seconds.
Weakspot hits count as 2 hits towards triggering Frost Vortex.

properties.description: The closer to the center of the Frost Vortex, the higher the Frost Vortex DMG, up to +200%.

weapons.description: KAM Assault Rifle packs a punch with its hefty recoil but delivers reliable sustained fire, making it ideal for mid-range combat

weapons.name: M416 - Silent Anabasis

base_stats.damage_bonus: Suppression: Dealing more DMG against Deviants

mechanics.description: Frost Vortex mechanics with Ice Crystal generation and damage scaling based on shattered Ice Crystals.

effects.description: Traps enemies within a 4.5m radius and inflicts 30% Psi Intensity Status DMG per second for 4 seconds.
Generates an Ice Crystal upon triggering Frost Vortex.
Ice Crystals automatically shatter after 15 seconds, dealing Frost Elemental Status DMG equal to 100% Psi Intensity to nearby targets.
Shattering Ice Crystals by shooting them increases the DMG they deal to 60% to players.
Increases Frost Elemental DMG by an additional 20% for every Ice Crystal shattered, stacking up to 15 times for 10 seconds.

weapons.description: M416 Assault Rifle with pinpoint accuracy, rock-steady, your go-to for mid to long-range combat

weapons.name: SOCR - The Last Valor

mechanics.description: Shrapnel mechanics with increased trigger chances upon multiple hits, enhanced damage on crit hits, and bonuses to Shrapnel DMG.

effects.description: Deals Weapon DMG of 50% Attack to a random unhit part.
Crit hits count as 2 hits towards triggering Shrapnel.
Crit hits grant Shrapnel trigger chance +1% for 1 second.

weapons.description: SOCR Assault Rifle with high accuracy, perfect for mid to long-range combat

weapons.name: Recurve Crossbow

mechanics.description: The Bull's Eye mechanics that trigger on hitting a weakspot, applying Vulnerability to targets and increasing Crit Rate against marked targets.

effects.description: Inflicts The Bull's Eye on the target, highlighting them and applying Vulnerability +8% for 12 seconds. Additionally, all weapons have Crit Rate +15% against targets with The Bull's Eye for 10 seconds. This effect only works once on the same target within 15 seconds.

weapons.description: A legendary Crossbow with The Bull's Eye mechanics that trigger on hitting weakspots. Inflicting The Bull's Eye highlights targets and applies Vulnerability +8%, while increasing Crit Rate against marked targets. The effect only applies once on the same target within 15 seconds, ensuring high effectiveness against prioritized foes.

weapons.name: Compound Bow

mechanics.description: Fortress Warfare mechanics that trigger after aiming for 3 seconds, providing Attack bonuses and Heavy Armor to allies, with stackable bonuses upon defeating enemies.

effects.description: Creates a 2m radius area granting allies Heavy Armor for 5 seconds.
Gain 3 stacks of Brutal Mayhem and Weakspot DMG +25%.
Every shot reduces Brutal Mayhem stacks by 1.
Attack increases the longer you aim, up to 30%.

properties.description: Heavy Armor grants Super Armor and Weapon DMG +20%.

weapons.description: A legendary Crossbow with Fortress Warfare mechanics that trigger after aiming for 3 seconds. Fortress Warfare creates a 2m radius area granting allies Heavy Armor for 5 seconds. Attack increases the longer you aim, up to 30%. Defeating enemies grants Brutal Mayhem stacks, enhancing Weakspot DMG. Ensures high combat effectiveness with sustained Attack bonuses and team support.

mechanics.description: Imported base weapon data from Once Human DB. Direct local mechanic extraction from game files is still pending.

weapons.name: Recurve Bow

mechanics.description: Stacking Attack and Weakspot DMG bonuses over time, with stacks reset upon movement, standing up, or hitting a target.

effects.description: Gain 1 stack of Attack +10% and Weakspot DMG +15% every 1 second, up to 3 stacks.
Effect is canceled when standing up.
Effect is canceled when moving.
Effect is canceled when hitting a target.

weapons.description: A fine Crossbow that grants stacking Attack +10% and Weakspot DMG +15% bonuses every second. These effects stack up to 3 times and are canceled when the user stands up, moves, or hits a target, ensuring sustained damage output while stationary.

weapons.name: MG4 - Mr Squid

mechanics.description: Bounce mechanics with increased trigger chances on critical hits, Weapon DMG stacking, and bonuses when firing continuously or having high ammo.

effects.description: Deals Weapon DMG of 60% Attack to a random enemy within a 10m radius.
When Bounce hits, Weapon DMG +2%, up to 50 stacks. 1 stack is removed every 5 seconds.
After continuously firing for 2 seconds, Bounce targets +1.
When remaining bullets are more than 50% of the magazine capacity, Attack +40%.

weapons.description: MG4 Light Machine Gun, perfect for laying down continuous fire on mid to long-range targets

effects.description: Triggers Fast Gunner, granting Fire Rate and Attack bonuses.
Refills 1 bullet from inventory to the secondary weapon.
Restores 1 bullet from inventory to the secondary weapon.

properties.description: Each Fast Gunner stack grants Fire Rate +1% and Attack +1% for 2 seconds.

weapons.description: MG4 Light Machine Gun, perfect for laying down continuous fire on mid to long-range targets

weapons.name: KV-SBR - Icy Rain

mechanics.description: Frost Vortex mechanics with a chance to trigger on crit hits, auto-reloading, and increased number of existing vortices.

effects.description: Traps enemies within a 4.5m radius and inflicts 30% Psi Intensity Status DMG per second for 4 seconds.
Automatically reloads 15% of bullets after creating Frost Vortex.

properties.description: Allows up to 2 Frost Vortex to exist simultaneously.

effects.description: Penetration: Increases damage by 20% when attacking Rosetta.

weapons.description: KV-SBR SMG, blazing fast fire rate, perfect for high-octane close-quarters combat

weapons.name: MPS7 - Div-Evo

mechanics.description: Shrapnel mechanics with increased trigger chances upon defeating enemies and enhanced targeting when hitting weakspots.

effects.description: Deals Weapon DMG of 50% Attack to a random unhit part.
Increases the chance to trigger Shrapnel by 80% for 12 seconds after defeating an enemy.
Hitting a Weakspot grants Shrapnel target parts +1 for 4 seconds.

weapons.description: MPS7 Submachine Gun: compact, lightweight, with a rapid fire rate, perfect for mid to close-range combat

weapons.name: KV-SBR - Little Jaws

mechanics.description: Unstable Bomber mechanics with increased damage upon hitting enemies affected by Unstable Bomber, additional damage modifiers for weakspot hits, and scaling damage based on Unstable Bomber delay.

effects.description: Triggers Unstable Bomber, inflicting a blast of 100% Psi Intensity after 0.4 seconds with a blast radius of 1.5m. The damage decays over distance down to a minimum of 50%.
Hitting enemies affected by Unstable Bomber increases the current Unstable Bomber Final DMG by 10% for 4 seconds.
Weakspot hits double the DMG increase, adding an additional 10% to Explosive Final DMG.

properties.description: Unstable Bomber delay increased by 0.3 seconds.
For every 0.1 seconds of Unstable Bomber delay, Unstable Bomber DMG increases by 20%.

weapons.description: KV-SBR SMG, blazing fast fire rate, perfect for high-octane close-quarters combat

mechanics.description: Bounce mechanics with increased trigger chances when hitting weakspots and additional damage against Protocell.

effects.description: Deals Weapon DMG of 60% Attack to a random enemy within a 10m radius.
Bounce trigger factor for this shot is increased by 60% when hitting a weakspot.
When magazine capacity is below 50%, the number of Bounce triggers increases by 1.
Impact: Increases damage by 20% when attacking Protocell.

mechanics.description: Shrapnel mechanics with increased trigger chances upon multiple hits, enhanced damage on crit hits, and bonuses to Shrapnel DMG.

effects.description: Deals Weapon DMG of 50% Attack to a random unhit part.
Crit hits count as 2 hits towards triggering Shrapnel.
Crit hits grant Shrapnel trigger chance +1% for 1 second.

weapons.description: AWS.338 Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle, with long Range, high Power, and pinpoint accuracy, perfect for long-distance precision firing

weapons.name: SN700 - Gulped Lore

mechanics.description: Unstable Bomber mechanics with increased damage and bonuses upon defeating enemies.

effects.description: Triggers Unstable Bomber, dealing a status DMG blast of 100% Psi Intensity after 0.1 seconds with a blast radius of 1.5m.
Defeating an enemy decreases explosion range by 10% and increases DMG by 20% for 30 seconds, up to 5 stacks.
Defeating an enemy increases DMG by 20% for 30 seconds, up to 5 stacks.

properties.description: Unstable Bomber is guaranteed to deal Crit DMG.
With every 1% Weakspot DMG, Unstable Bomber DMG increases by 1%.

weapons.description: SN700 Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle, pinpoint accuracy with powerful firepower, perfect for long-range sniping

weapons.name: AWS.338 - Bullseye

mechanics.description: The Bull's Eye mechanics that trigger on weakspot hits and after switching weapons, providing Vulnerability and damage bonuses.

effects.description: Highlights the marked target and inflicts Vulnerability +8% for 12 seconds.
Highlights the marked target and inflicts Vulnerability +8% for 12 seconds on the first hit after switching weapons.
With a hit, Weakspot DMG +15% for 10 seconds. Effect can stack up to 3 times.
After defeating an enemy with a weakspot hit, Attack +15% for 20 seconds.
